changes.summary: During dependency resolution, flows exported as data sources (data.genesyscloud_flow) are skipped for dependent resource discovery because they are referenced only and not managed as resources.

During configuration sanitization, reference attributes backed by custom resolvers that can infer a target type from the exported configuration are now converted to Terraform resource or data source references when that type can be determined.

related_export_changes.summary: Exports that include data source flow blocks may produce fewer related resources and different depends_on entries, because dependency fetching is no longer run for those flows.
